title: HKUDS/DeepTutor
friendlyTitle: DeepTutor is an AI study helper you can run yourself
summary: DeepTutor is an open-source, lifelong personalised tutoring system with a knowledge centre for ingesting and managing learning materials. The repository is trending strongly and its recent release adds more granular document removal and retry handling for knowledge bases.
friendlySummary: DeepTutor is an open-source tutoring tool. It can organise learning materials and give more personal help over time.
whyItMatters: Use it to build a private study assistant around your own notes, documents and curriculum material, rather than a generic chatbot. It is especially relevant for learners or educators who want persistent context and controllable source material.
friendlyWhyItMatters: You can use it to make a study helper with your own notes and documents. This can be useful for students and teachers who want more control over the material.
